title: Is is possibly to Display the Column "Creation log" in the Kanban view?

posts.author: DHG (Daniel Greve)
posts.cookedHtml:
I need to display the date for the creation of an item in the Kanban view.
But I cannot find the column "Creation log"in the selection box even though I have created the column in the table view

Can someone guide me where to do this?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t believe that ‘Creation Log’ column type is available in Kanban. What I’d recommend is adding a date column and then setting a default item value of creation date for that column and using it instead.
